_comment: Shared keyword catalogue used by both scripts/tag_keywords.py (regex) and scripts/tag_keywords_llm.py (Claude API). The regex tagger reads `patterns`; the LLM tagger reads `description`. Edit freely — both tag names and descriptions can be tuned. Papers get one or more tags; the fallback tag is applied when none match.

tags.name: LLM
tags.description: Large language models, GPT/ChatGPT/LLaMA, prompting techniques, chain-of-thought, in-context learning, instruction tuning, reasoning

tags.name: Multimodal/VLM
tags.description: Vision-language models, multimodal learning (text+image+...), MLLMs, CLIP-like models

tags.name: Diffusion/Generation
tags.description: Diffusion models, generative models (image/video/text generation), flow matching, score-based, DDPM, GANs, text-to-X synthesis

tags.name: Agent
tags.description: Autonomous / agentic systems, agent frameworks, tool use, multi-agent collaboration

tags.name: RAG/Retrieval
tags.description: Retrieval-augmented generation, dense retrieval for LLMs

tags.name: Federated
tags.description: Federated learning (FedAvg, FedProx, cross-silo, cross-device)

tags.name: Graph/GNN
tags.description: Graph neural networks (GCN/GAT/GNN), graph representation learning, graph mining, heterogeneous graphs, hypergraphs

tags.name: Spatiotemporal/Urban
tags.description: Spatiotemporal modeling, urban computing, traffic / mobility / trajectory prediction, geospatial AI, POI, GPS, city-scale prediction, ride-hailing, logistics. For satellite/aerial image analysis use Remote Sensing instead.

tags.name: Time Series
tags.description: Time-series forecasting / classification / anomaly detection, sequential prediction (non-spatial)

tags.name: Recommendation
tags.description: Recommender systems, collaborative filtering, CTR / click-through prediction, sequential / session-based recommendation, user modeling

tags.name: Reinforcement Learning
tags.description: Reinforcement learning (policy optimization, Q-learning, MDPs, bandits, RLHF). NOT 'representation learning' or 'reinforced'.

tags.name: Self-Supervised/Contrastive
tags.description: Self-supervised learning, contrastive learning (SimCLR/MoCo-style), masked image / language modeling

tags.name: Robust/Noisy/Spurious
tags.description: Robustness to noisy labels / noisy correspondence / spurious correlations, adversarial robustness, out-of-distribution generalization, distribution shift

tags.name: Causal
tags.description: Causal inference, counterfactual reasoning, interventions, confounder adjustment, instrumental variables

tags.name: Domain Adaptation/Transfer
tags.description: Domain adaptation, domain generalization, transfer learning, cross-domain / cross-city / cross-source modeling

tags.name: Continual/Incremental
tags.description: Continual / lifelong / incremental learning, class-incremental, catastrophic forgetting mitigation

tags.name: Few-Shot/Zero-Shot
tags.description: Few-shot / zero-shot / one-shot learning, meta-learning

tags.name: Privacy/DP
tags.description: Differential privacy, privacy-preserving machine learning

tags.name: Fairness/Bias
tags.description: Algorithmic fairness, debiasing, equity / discrimination mitigation. NOT inductive bias.

tags.name: Security/Attack
tags.description: Adversarial attacks (backdoor / poisoning / jailbreak / evasion), membership inference, ML security

tags.name: Knowledge Graph
tags.description: Knowledge graphs / knowledge bases, entity linking / alignment, KG embeddings

tags.name: Anomaly/Outlier
tags.description: Anomaly / outlier / novelty / fraud detection

tags.name: Tabular
tags.description: Tabular data ML, table understanding, schema-aware models

tags.name: Optimization/Theory
tags.description: Optimization methods (SGD, Adam, convergence analysis), learning theory, sample complexity, regret bounds

tags.name: Benchmark/Dataset
tags.description: Papers whose primary contribution is a new benchmark, dataset, or evaluation suite

tags.name: NLP/Text
tags.description: Classical NLP tasks (text classification / generation / mining / summarization / dialogue / NER) that are NOT primarily about LLMs

tags.name: 3D/Reconstruction
tags.description: 3D vision: NeRF, Gaussian splatting, 3D reconstruction, point cloud processing, depth estimation, stereo matching, mesh/voxel, SfM, SLAM, LiDAR-based 3D, radiance fields, novel view synthesis

tags.name: Video/Tracking
tags.description: Video understanding, action recognition/detection, object tracking, optical flow, temporal modeling for video, motion estimation, video prediction

tags.name: Pose/Body/Avatar
tags.description: Human pose estimation, body/hand/face reconstruction, avatar generation, gesture recognition, gait analysis, human mesh recovery, motion capture, re-identification

tags.name: Detection/Segmentation
tags.description: Object detection (2D), semantic/instance/panoptic segmentation, scene parsing, image/video segmentation — NOT 3D detection (use 3D/Reconstruction)

tags.name: Autonomous Driving
tags.description: Self-driving, autonomous vehicles, end-to-end driving, driving scene understanding, BEV perception, lane detection, trajectory prediction for vehicles

tags.name: Robotics/Embodied
tags.description: Robotics, embodied AI, manipulation, grasping, navigation in physical environments, humanoid control, sim-to-real transfer

tags.name: Editing/Restoration
tags.description: Image/video editing, inpainting, super-resolution, enhancement, restoration, style transfer, HDR, matting, denoising, deblurring, colorization

tags.name: Remote Sensing
tags.description: Satellite imagery, aerial imagery, remote sensing, earth observation, geospatial analysis from overhead imagery, change detection on satellite data

tags.name: Vision/Image
tags.description: Vision-only tasks (image classification / recognition / retrieval, visual representation learning) that are NOT primarily multimodal, 3D, video, or detection/segmentation

tags.name: Search/IR
tags.description: Information retrieval, document ranking, web search, query understanding

tags.name: Web/Social
tags.description: Web mining, social networks, misinformation / fake news / rumor detection, influence maximization

tags.name: Efficiency/Compression
tags.description: Model efficiency (quantization, pruning, distillation, sparsity, MoE / mixture-of-experts, efficient inference/training)

tags.name: Healthcare/Bio
tags.description: Clinical / medical / healthcare ML, drug discovery / design, protein modeling, genomics, biomedical applications

tags.name: Code/Programming
tags.description: Code generation, program synthesis, AI for software engineering
